title: Pan-Seared Canadian Salmon with Canadian Glaze
description: A flavorful and moist Canadian salmon dish, pan-seared to perfection and served with a sweet and tangy Canadian glaze.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer to the oven.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
In a small saucepan, combine the maple syrup, lime juice, and BBQ sauce.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until reduced by half.
Brush the glaze over the salmon during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the salmon hot with bisquettes on the side.
